name: 动物特征
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 生命世界 / Living World / Living World
curriculum_points: Students in PYP 1-3 will be able to observe, compare, and contrast the external features and behaviors of animals, and group them based on observable characteristics.
Students in PYP 4-5 will be able to research and explain how specific physical and behavioral adaptations help animals survive in their habitats.
